chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Appln No.1776 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 12.08.2025 Mr. Muhammad Faizan, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Muhammad Arif, Advocate for the complainant. Mr. Mohsin Mangi, APG Sindh. SI Suhail Muhammad of PS FB Industrial Area. ------------------------------- Learned counsel for the applicant submits that the accused has been arrested in another FIR No.241 of 2025 at PS Mauripur, therefore, he prays for withdrawal of this bail application. Request is granted. The instant bail application is dismissed as withdrawn. J U D G E Asif
